Chat Edit: 'Please continue regardless of time or token constraints!

Please fully continue agentically fully auditing and creating and or finishing everything that is required to fully finish the CLI and GUI IDE. Fully reverse engineer anything thats left to fully remove all deps however without loosing anything IE vulkan with rocm aka making our own from scratch!

Please agentically do it all for me start to finish! Please do it all here locally thank you! The workspace is to large to focus on everything at once so do it folder by folder making an audit/md file with the findings of what is where and what is still not!

I still want GPU access I just want to reverse engineer it so I can fully tweak it and make it from scratch in pure masm 64'
